title: Music of FFXII
description: The music of FFXII, ported to Java.
body:
This fairly simply pack ports the music of Final Fantasy 12 (FFXII), a favorite game of mine, to Minecraft. It replaces the default music with the music from FFXII, as close as I could match it. 


### THIS IS INTENDED TO BE USED WITH [REACTIVE MUSIC](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music)!



The full list of conversions from vanilla songs (Not Reactive Music) is:

### Overworld
- "Beginning 2", "Floating Trees", "Moog City 2", & "Mutation" -> "FINAL FANTASY ~FFXII Version"
 
- "Aria Math", "Biome Fest", "Blind Spots", "Dreiton", "Haunt Muskie", & "Taswell" are blank.
- "Aerie" -> "The Skycity of Bhujerba"
- "Ancestry" -> "The Golmore Jungle"
- "A Familiar Room" -> "FINAL FANTASY XII OST - Game Over Extended"
- "An Ordinary Day" -> "To The Peak"
- "Bromeliad" -> "An Omen"
- "Clark" -> "Basch's Reminiscence"
- "Comforting Memories" -> "A Land of Memories"
- "Crescent Dunes" -> "The Dalmasca Westersand"
    - My favorite song out of the bunch!

- "Danny" -> "Destiny"
- "Dry Hands" -> "Giza Plains"
- "Echo in the Wind" -> "White Room"
- "Firebugs" -> "Eruyt Village"
- "Floating Dream" -> "Dark Night (Imperial Version)"
- "Haggstrom" -> "The Royal City of Rabanastre / City Ward Upper Stratum"
- "Infinite Amethyst" -> "Rabanastre Downtown"
- "Key" -> "The End of the Battle"
- "Labyrinthine" -> "The Feywood"
- "Left to Bloom" -> "Giruvegan's Mystery"
- "Living Mice" -> "Parting with Penelo
- "Mice on Venus" -> "Jahara, Land of the Garif"
- "Minecraft" -> "Chocobo FFXII Arrange Ver. 1"
- "One More Day" -> "The Salikawood"
- "Oxygene" -> "The Cerobi Steppe"
- "Stand Tall" -> "To The Peak"
    - I repeated this because it both 1) felt appropriate for both circumstances and 2) had overlap in the biomes it played in anyway.

- "Subwoofer Lullaby" -> "A Moment's Rest"
- "Sweden" -> "The Princess' Vision"
- "Wending" -> "To the Palace of the Gods"
- "Wet Hands" -> "Ozmone Plain"
### Underwater
- "Axolotl" -> "Near The Water"
  
- "Dragon Fish" -> "The Port of Balfonheim"
- "Shuniji" -> "The Sandsea"
### Nether
- "Ballad of the Cats" -> "An Imminent Threat"
  
- "Chrysopoeia" -> "The Barheim Passage"
- "Concrete Halls" -> "The Zertinan Caverns"
- "Dead Voxel" -> "Seeking Power"
    - Another really cool one.
- "Rubedo" -> "The Sandsea"
    - This only plays in the Nether Wastes, and most won't ever hear Shuniji.

- "So Below" -> "The Tomb of Raithwall"
### End
- "Credits" -> "Theme of FINAL FANTASY XII (Presentation Version)"
  
- "Boss" -> "Boss Battle"
- "The End" -> "The Garamsythe Waterway"



For Reactive Music, the pack comes with entirely custom data and doesn't simply replace vanilla songs. As such, I can't put it in here, as it would be too long. If you really need to know, download it!
If you find that the music delay is too long, or you want constant music, enable it in the config. However, this is not for everyone, so it is disabled by default.
